nasb.text: As for their children, half spoke in the language of Ashdod, and none of them was able to speak the language of Judah, but the language of his own people.

esv.text: And half of their children spoke the language of Ashdod, and they could not speak the language of Judah, but only the language of each people.

cnv.text: 他們的兒女有一半說亞實突話，其他就說他們民族的語言，他們卻不會說猶大話。

ccb.text: 他们半数的子女说亚实突话或其他外族人的话，不懂得犹大话。
